item.title: Zoox upgrades its robotaxi as it prepares for commercial service
item.dc:creator: Kirsten Korosec
item.description: The new Zoox robotaxi has more cushioning, lighter colors, and a better microphone and speaker for communicating with Zoox Support.

item.title: This new tracking label could help solve cargo theft
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The Samsara Tracking Label hides a BLE system that can offer real-time location in a disposable package.

item.title: OpenAI unveils its first custom chip, built by Broadcom
item.dc:creator: Russell Brandom
item.description: Named Jalapeño, the new processor was designed specifically for the unique needs of OpenAI's inference systems.

item.title: If you want to cut your screen time, just get a Brick
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: After years of struggling to curb my screen time, apparently all I needed was a $59 hunk of plastic.

item.title: 3 days left to save up to $190 on your TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 pass
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: You have just 3 days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register here.

item.title: Valor Equity Partners looks to raise a $2.5B Fund VII, per Bloomberg
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: New details have emerged about Valor's latest fund, which last year announced it was raising an unspecified amount of capital.

item.title: Slate Auto’s radically simple electric truck starts at $24,950
item.dc:creator: Sean O'Kane
item.description: The Jeff Bezos-backed startup finally revealed more pricing details for its debut EV, including a $29,950 starting price for the SUV variant, and boosted the base range to 205 miles.

item.title: How to invest when everything is moving too fast
item.dc:creator: Connie Loizos
item.description: TechCrunch's StrictlyVC evening in Los Angeles late last week brought together two of the more straight-talking investors working in AI right now. They were as entertaining as they were illuminating.

item.title: Walmart-backed Flipkart expands quick-commerce push as Amazon ramps up in India
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: Walmart-backed Flipkart has crossed 1,000 micro-fulfillment centers as Amazon accelerates its own quick-commerce push in India.

item.title: India’s MoEngage bets that the future of marketing is millions of AI agents
item.dc:creator: Jagmeet Singh
item.description: The all-cash deal gives MoEngage access to technology that assigns AI agents to individual customers.

item.title: Superhuman acquires AI detection startup GPTZero
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Superhuman, which also has an AI detection tool as part of Grammarly, has snapped up GPTZero.

item.title: After betting the firm on Anthropic, Menlo Ventures raises victorious $3B fund
item.dc:creator: Julie Bort
item.description: Menlo has created a solid rep for itself as an AI investor, all based on one gutsy $750 million move in 2024.

item.title: Klue says hackers stole credential from 2022 that led to customer data breaches
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: It's unclear why Klue had not revoked the credential after the limited pilot, which hackers then used to breach a system holding keys for accessing customers' data.

item.title: Mark Zuckerberg wants Meta to launch its own prediction market
item.dc:creator: Lucas Ropek
item.description: The app would be independent of Meta's other social media offerings, although sources told the NYT that those social sites could direct users to engagement with the app.

item.title: Anthropic’s Claude Tag is learning your company, one Slack message at a time
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Bellan
item.description: Anthropic’s new Claude Tag brings an always-on AI teammate to Slack. But beyond productivity, the feature is a strategic play to capture organizational context, institutional knowledge, and enterprise workflows.

item.title: Password manager maker LastPass says hackers stole customer support case data during Klue breach
item.dc:creator: Zack Whittaker
item.description: This is the second data breach to affect LastPass customers in recent years, after one of the password manager's tech partners was recently breached.

item.title: HaloBraid raises $7M from Seven Seven Six to end the six-hour hair salon appointment
item.dc:creator: Dominic-Madori Davis
item.description: HaloBraid aims to help salons speed up braiding with its first device, slated to launch later this year, that acts as a braiding assistant for professional stylists.

item.title: Meta debuts new, cheaper smart glasses under its own brand
item.dc:creator: Aisha Malik
item.description: The smart glasses are available in several countries starting today in a variety of color and lens combinations.

item.title: 4 days left to save up to $190 on TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch Events
item.description: Four days left to save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 — the ultimate founder bootcamp — before Early Bird rates end on June 26 at 11:59 p.m. PT. Register today.

item.title: Ribbie turns real-time baseball stats into arcade-like, pixel-art broadcasts
item.dc:creator: Amanda Silberling
item.description: Ribbie lets you follow along live with MLB games with a delightful, arcade-inspired interface.
